title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Jared Sires at Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code, to help sales representatives draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool addresses the administrative burden on GTM teams by automating email composition.
